content.en:
Silent Black Sea.

Ye Tian took Han Xuan to shuttle here, and this time it was Han Xuan's body that followed, not the will clone, because the sixfold original ancestor, the will clone could not leave the boundary, and once it left, it would directly crumble.

After all, the Sixfold Ancestor did not transcend the boundaries of the region at once, and could not perceive the situation outside the boundary, and once he left the boundary, he would also cut off all contact.

And the will clone must have a slight connection with the ontology in order to be maintained, otherwise it will collapse.

Therefore, Ye Tian could only take Han Xuan's body.

At this time, Han Xuan was a little nervous, although she was very strong in her previous life, she was also worried that she would really fall!

The Silent Black Sea is too dangerous, if the master can't protect her, she'll be finished!

Soon.

They encountered a primordial artifact, which was in the form of a dead wood, and its strength was okay, second only to the weaker Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, and was killed by Ye Tian in one blow.

On the next journey, he encountered several primordial antiquities, all of which were killed by Ye Tian.

In this way, Ye Tian and Han Xuan were getting closer and closer to the boundary of the Tongtian Origin Domain.

Abrupt.

Above the silent Black Sea, energy surged, and the black light seemed to turn into a hurricane.

Seeing this scene, Han Xuan's face changed: "Master, it's not good, this is the primordial ancients who are about to appear, quickly escape into the nearby district boundary!"

"The primordial ancients!"

Ye Tian naturally also knew about this primordial antiquity, although he didn't know much about it, but he also knew that some of the primordial antiquities appeared in the form of humans, called primordial ancients, and their strength was very terrifying and weird.

The point is that the primordial ancients will always hunt down the original ancestors, the kind that will never die.

Therefore, many Sixfold Ancestors encountered the Primordial Ancients, and would flee to the nearby boundary, so that the Primordial Ancients would not be able to chase and kill, and would leave silently.

After a period of time, the Sixfold Ancestor can enter the Silent Black Sea again, and he will not encounter the Primordial Ancients.

And the strength of the primordial ancients is strong and weak, but the weakest is also comparable to the average sixfold primordial ancestor mid-stage, the average sixfold primordial ancestor early Dao ancestor does not dare to provoke the weakest primordial ancient, if it encounters a powerful primordial ancient, maybe there is no hope of escaping.

However, the probability of a Sixfold Ancestor encountering a Primordial Ancients is very low, unless he stays in the Silent Black Sea for a long time, he may encounter it.

But Ye Tian and Han Xuan didn't enter the Silent Black Sea for a long time, and they encountered the primordial ancients, so their luck was really bad.

"The nearest district boundary is also far away from here, and it is too late to go to other district borders. "

Ye Tian said.

Han Xuan was very panicked, after all, he didn't have the strength of his previous life now, and he couldn't do anything, so he could only hope for his master.

Airplanes!!!

A black figure emerged from the black hurricane, moving forward quickly in a strange way, approaching Ye Tian's side.

"Endless Black Domain!"

"Suppression!"

Ye Tian shot directly, and as soon as he made a move, he went all out.

After all, he was still with Han Xuan, so naturally he couldn't let Han Xuan be hurt, otherwise a little aftermath would kill Han Xuan.

Under the suppression of the Endless Black Domain, the speed of this primordial ancient was limited, but it was still fast.

However, Ye Tian's endless speed was faster, so that this primordial ancient could not catch up.

And Ye Tian attacked with endless golden light, shattering the body of the primordial ancients again and again, but it quickly recovered.

"It's so hard to kill!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Although he knew that the strength of the primordial ancients was not weak, he didn't know that the primordial ancients were so difficult to kill.

In terms of strength, this primordial ancient is comparable to the average sixfold mid-stage ancestor, and its strength is not as good as the Changfeng Dao Ancestor who was killed by him.

However, he had killed the Changfeng Dao Ancestor in a few moves, but this primordial ancient had been attacked by him dozens of times in a short period of time and had not yet been killed.

"Master, the primordial ancients are very difficult to kill, and the recovery power is very fast, much more difficult to kill than the sixfold primordial ancestors!" Han Xuan said.

But.

Ye Tian was advancing towards the boundary of the Tongtian Origin Domain while attacking the Primordial Ancients.

Finally, after hundreds of thousands of attacks, he finally killed this primordial ancient.

Moreover, Ye Tian also found a black bead in the place where the primordial ancients fell.

......

"Shizun actually killed a primordial ancient !!"

Han Xuan was shocked.

You must know that even the weakest primordial ancients had to be at least the powerhouse of the peak of the fourfold primordial ancestors to deliberately kill them!

After all, the primordial ancients were like immortal bodies, and they were too difficult to kill!

But now, his master had just broken through to become a sixfold ancestor, and he had actually killed a primordial ancient.

"Could it be that Master Venerable has comprehended three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, created the Supreme Primordial Mastery Technique, and broke through with the Supreme Primordial Mastery Technique?"

Han Xuan thought to herself.

Although she was very strong in her previous life, she is very weak now, so she can't see through the attack methods of the Sixfold Ancestor level, so she can't judge.

But from the point of view of strength, Ye Tian is afraid that he has really comprehended the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, and he has become a sixfold origin ancestor in the most extreme way, and he is afraid that the condensed is the ninefold path fruit!

She couldn't compare to Ye Tian's potential in her previous life, otherwise she wouldn't have been reincarnated.

"The primeval realm is not strong, it is rumored that the primeval Dao Ancestor is an original ancestor who has comprehended three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, but I didn't expect another one to be born!"

Han Xuan said secretly.

She felt that her master was afraid that there was a great opportunity, otherwise it would be impossible for her to have such potential in a place like the primeval realm.

"I'm lucky, I just had such a master after I was reincarnated, and I will have a backer in the future!" Han Xuan thought to herself.

......

"What is this?"

Ye Tian took the bead left behind by the original ancients after their death and asked.

"This is the Primordial Ancient Pearl!" Han Xuan introduced: "Killing the Primordial Ancient Pearl, you can obtain the Primordial Ancient Bead in his body, the value of the Primordial Ancient Bead is very high, it can be used to heal injuries, such as the Qinglong Dao Ancestor who was killed by the master, the Dao Fruit of the Qinglong Dao Ancestor is broken, such an injury is difficult to recover, but the Primordial Ancient Bead can restore the Dao Fruit." In addition, you can also refine the Primordial Orb in battle, and have a method similar to that of the Primordial Ancients, which is difficult to kill. However, the power of the Primordial Ancient Bead is exhausted, and there is no way to use it anymore!"

"It seems that this thing is really a good thing! if you kill a large number of primordial ancients, you will make a lot of money!" Ye Tian muttered.

Han Xuan's face changed, and he reminded: "Master, you can't have such an idea, some extremely powerful primordial ancients are even comparable to the half-step sevenfold primordial ancestor, and there may even be primordial ancients comparable to the sevenfold primordial ancestor. "

"I'm just saying, let's go, keep going, we should be about to reach the boundary of the Tongtian Plain Domain!"

Ye Tian said.
